svg.text: LLaMA 3.1 holds the largest public record at 15.6T tokens
Grok 3 Colossus cluster is the largest known to date
Energy ~= electricity for 50K homes for a year (GPT-4)
Cost doubles roughly every 18 months at frontier scale
Sources: Meta AI, Google DeepMind, OpenAI technical reports, Epoch AI estimates. Closed-source figures are estimates.
